meta.title: Salt Trap
meta.teaser: Your eggs need salt. But the saltshaker has other plans!

text: You sit at the table. Breakfast time!
There are eggs on your plate.
You take a bite. Hmm...
Not salty enough!

commands.response: The eggs are okay but they need more salt!
A nice plate of eggs. Yummy! But not salty enough.
The saltshaker sits on the table. Maybe you should grab it!
You already have eggs on your fork, silly!
You can't take the whole plate! Just eat your eggs!
You grab the saltshaker.

default: You bonk your fork on the table. That didn't help!
Nope! Just eat your breakfast!
That's not how breakfast works, silly!
Your eggs are getting cold! Try something else!
The table wiggles. Nothing happens though!
You wave your fork around. Nope! Still not salty!
hints: What could make eggs taste better? Look around!

text: You try to shake salt on your eggs.
But OH NO!
Your finger slides into one of the little holes!
You try to pull it out. It won't budge!
You push it back in and try again...

commands.response: Your finger is really stuck in there!
Your eggs are getting cold! You need to get unstuck!
You push your finger in one more time and WHOOOOSH! Your whole body gets sucked inside the saltshaker!
You can't open eggs! Your finger is stuck, remember?!

default: Your finger is stuck! Focus on the saltshaker!
Wiggle wiggle! Nope, still stuck!
That won't help you get unstuck!
Your finger says: HELP ME!
The saltshaker holds on tight! Try something else!
Nope! Your finger isn't going anywhere like that!
hints: Your finger is stuck in the saltshaker...

text: WHOA! You are TINY!
You are standing inside the saltshaker!
Salt crystals big as rocks are everywhere.
Way up above you can see tiny holes letting in light.
There is a shimmery lake ahead
and tall salt cliffs behind it.

commands.response: The lake sparkles and shimmers. It looks REALLY salty!
The cliffs are made of giant salt crystals. They go way up high!
The cliffs are on the other side of the lake. You need to cross the lake first!
You walk toward the shimmery salt lake.

default: You lick a salt rock. SO SALTY! But that didn't help!
You kick a salt crystal. Ouch! Bad idea!
Nope! You are tiny and stuck in a saltshaker!
You yell HELLO! Your voice echoes off the salt walls!
That doesn't work when you are this tiny!
You sit on a salt rock. Comfy! But not helpful!
hints: You need to find a way up to those holes...
The lake and the cliffs might help. Try going somewhere!

text: You stand at the edge of the salt lake.
The water is SO salty!
You step in and... you FLOAT!
Like a cork!
You bob around on top of the water.
On the far side you see a big shiny crystal.

commands.response: The water is thick and salty. You float on top like magic!
A big sparkly crystal sits on the far shore. It looks pointy and strong!
You are already floating on the lake! That crystal on the far side looks useful!
The crystal is right there! Try to TAKE it!
You scoop up some water. BLEH! So salty! You spit it out!
You float across the lake and grab the big crystal! It is pointy and strong like a pick!

default: You splash in the salty water. Wheee! But not helpful!
You float on your back. This is fun! But you need to escape!
The salt makes your skin tingly! But that didn't do anything!
You do a little spin in the water. Bloop bloop!
Nope! The lake is fun but you need to keep moving!
You blow bubbles in the salty water. POP POP POP!
hints: There is something shiny on the far side of the lake...
That crystal looks useful! How do you pick things up?

text: You stand at the bottom of the tall salt cliffs.
The holes at the top are WAY up there!
The cliff is smooth and slippery.
You need something to help you grip!

commands.response: So smooth and slippery! You need something pointy to hold on to.
Your crystal is pointy and strong. Like a little pick!
You dig the crystal into the salt wall like a pick! Chip! Chip! Chip! You pull yourself up higher and higher!
You try to climb but it is too slippery! You slide right back down!
You can't climb a crystal! Try climbing the cliff!
You poke the cliff with the crystal. Try CLIMBING the cliff instead!

default: You lick the cliff wall. Yep, still salt!
You poke the cliff. It is hard as a rock!
Nope! The cliff is too slippery for that!
You slide down the cliff on your belly. Wheeee! But not helpful!
That won't get you up the cliff!
You jump up and down. Not high enough!
hints: The cliff is too slippery to climb with bare hands...
You have something pointy that could help you grip!
Try CLIMB CLIFF while holding the crystal!

text: You made it near the top!
You can see the little holes right above you!
Light pours in from the kitchen.
You stack up salt crystals into a big bouncy pile.
Time to jump!

commands.response: A big pile of salt crystals. Looks bouncy! Like a trampoline!
You bounce UP UP UP! Your fingers touch the edge of a hole! But... you slip! WHOOOOSH! You fall ALL the way back down! THUD!
You bounce UP UP UP! Your fingers touch the edge of a hole! But... you slip! WHOOOOSH! You fall ALL the way back down! THUD!

default: You are so close to the holes! Try the salt pile!
Almost there! The bouncy pile is right there!
Nope! The holes are right above you! Try jumping!
You wave at the light coming through the holes. HELLO!
So close to freedom! Try the salt pile!
You can almost taste breakfast again! Try jumping!
hints: That bouncy pile of salt looks like it could launch you up...
Try climbing or going to the salt pile!

text: You land at the bottom with a THUMP.
Ouch! That did not work.
But wait... you hear a GIANT voice!
"Where did all the salt go?"
It is Mom!
She picks up the saltshaker and shakes it.
WHOOOOOOSH!
You fly out through a hole!
POP! You are big again!
You are sitting at the table like nothing happened.
Mom looks at you funny.
"Why are you covered in salt?"
You just smile.
Your eggs are perfectly salty now.

commands.response: You are covered in salt from head to toe. What an adventure!
You whisper to the saltshaker: I am NEVER doing that again!

default: You made it out! Time to enjoy those salty eggs!
No more adventures for now! Just eat your breakfast!
You did it! You escaped the saltshaker!
Mom is still looking at you funny. Just smile!
Your eggs are perfect now. Worth it? Maybe!
